source_name: Code4rena Reserve Protocol Invitational Findings and Analysis Report (2023-07)
summary: The CBEthCollateral._underlyingRefPerTok() function just uses CBEth.exchangeRate() to get the ref/tok rate. The CBEth.exchangeRate() can only get the conversion rate from cbETH to staked ETH2 on the coinbase. However as the docs https://github.com/reserve-protocol/protocol/blob/9ee60f142f9f5c1fe8bc50eef915cf33124a534f/contracts/2023-07-reserve/protocol/contracts/plugins/assets/cbeth/README.md the ref unit should be ETH. The staked ETH2 must take a few days to unstake, which leads to a premium between ETH and cbETH.
root_cause: oracle/ref-per-token scaling mismatch: cbETH and ankrETH collateral use an incorrect underlyingRefPerTok conversion, mispricing collateral value
broken_invariants: collateral refPerTok must convert wrapped staking token exchange rates into the expected underlying/reference-token units
collateral valuation must not assume a staking-token exchange rate has the same decimals or semantics as the Reserve collateral interface
mis-scaled underlyingRefPerTok must not let baskets value or trade collateral at the wrong price
attack_preconditions: the affected Reserve collateral/plugin/wrapper is deployed or configured in an RToken basket
the report-described oracle, reward, wrapper, or integration edge case is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, trader, or protocol participant able to trigger the affected pricing/trading/reward/withdrawal flow
trigger_actions: execute or wait for the report-described state transition
observe mispricing, reward misallocation, fund lock, or availability failure

impact.description: The CBEthCollateral._underlyingRefPerTok() function just uses CBEth.exchangeRate() to get the ref/tok rate. The CBEth.exchangeRate() can only get the conversion rate from cbETH to staked ETH2 on the coinbase. However as the docs https://github.com/reserve-protocol/protocol/blob/9ee60f142f9f5c1fe8bc50eef915cf33124a534f/contracts/2023-07-reserve/protocol/contracts/plugins/assets/cbeth/README.md the ref unit should be ETH. The staked ETH2 must take a few days to unstake, which leads to a premium between ETH and cbETH.

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: verify the exact collateral plugin/wrapper is in scope and configured
check whether oracle freshness, decimals, or external integration assumptions differ in the current target
confirm the issue affects value movement, redemption availability, or reward ownership rather than a harmless view mismatch
mitigations: Use the cbETH/ETH oracle to get the cbETH/ETH rate. Or, the ref unit for the collateral should be the staked eth2. ### Assessed type Context
